annotations.text_en: Ocon spent 68.2% of his race in dirty air (30 of 44 laps), the most of any driver. Surprisingly, his pace in traffic was actually 0.35s faster than in clean air, likely due to slipstream effect on Albert Park's long straights. The Haas handles dirty air better than most.
annotations.text_tr: Ocon yarişinin %68.2'sini kirli havada gecirdi (44 turun 30'u), herhangi bir pilotun en yuksegi. Sasirtici sekilde trafikeki pace'i temiz havadan 0.35 saniye daha hizliydi, muhtemelen Albert Park'in uzun duzluklerindeki slipstream etkisi. Haas kirli havayi cogundan daha iyi idare ediyor.

annotations.text_en: Verstappen spent 40% of the race in traffic while climbing from P16 to P6, yet his pace loss was only +0.34s, the smallest among frontrunners. The Red Bull's active aero advantage in dirty air conditions is clear: Verstappen could follow closely without significant performance loss.
annotations.text_tr: Verstappen P16'dan P6'ya yukselirken yarisin %40'ini trafikte gecirdi, ancak pace kaybi sadece +0.34 saniye, on siradaki pilotlar arasinda en dusuk. Red Bull'un kirli hava kosullarindaki aktif aero avantaji acik: Verstappen belirgin performans kaybi olmadan yakindan takip edebildi.

annotations.text_en: Lawson suffered the worst traffic impact: +2.22s pace loss in dirty air, the highest of any driver. With 43.2% of his laps in traffic, the Racing Bulls car appears particularly sensitive to turbulent air. This explains why his raw pace (P14 qualifying) didn't translate to a better race result.
annotations.text_tr: Lawson en kotu trafik etkisini yasadi: kirli havada +2.22 saniye pace kaybi, tum pilotlarin en yuksegi. Turlarinin %43.2'si trafikte olan Racing Bulls araci turbulanli havaya ozellikle duyarli gorunuyor. Bu, ham pace'inin (siralama P14) neden daha iyi bir yaris sonucuna donusmediklerini acikliyor.

annotations.text_en: Leclerc only spent 11.1% of the race in traffic (5 laps), yet his pace loss when in traffic was a massive +2.49s. The Ferrari is extremely fast in clean air but collapses in dirty air. This is a car characteristic, not driver error: the SF-26's high-clipping energy profile worsens when following another car.
annotations.text_tr: Leclerc yarisin sadece %11.1'ini trafikte gecirdi (5 tur), ancak trafikteki pace kaybi muazzam +2.49 saniyeydi. Ferrari temiz havada son derece hizli ama kirli havada cokuyor. Bu pilot hatasi degil arac ozelligi: SF-26'nin yuksek clipping enerji profili baska bir araci takip ederken kotulasiyor.

annotations.text_en: Mercedes managed traffic efficiently: Russell 24.4% and Antonelli 17.8% in traffic. The 1-stop strategy under VSC gave them clear air for most of the race. Clean air running is key to Mercedes' dominance: their pace advantage disappears when stuck behind other cars.
annotations.text_tr: Mercedes trafigi verimli yonetti: Russell %24.4 ve Antonelli %17.8 trafikte. VSC altindaki 1 duraklamali strateji onlara yarisin buyuk bolumunde temiz hava sagladi. Temiz hava kosmak Mercedes'in hakimiyetinin anahtari: baska araclarin arkasinda kaldiklinda pace avantajlari kayboluyor.

annotations.text_en: Mercedes dominated qualifying with a half-second gap. Russell took pole (1:18.518), Antonelli P2 (+0.293s). The nearest non-Mercedes was Hadjar at P3 (+0.785s). Russell's fastest sectors in S1 (27.498s), S2 (17.284s), and S3 (33.736s) were all the best of anyone.
annotations.text_tr: Mercedes siralamaya yarim saniye farkla hakim oldu. Russell pole aldi (1:18.518), Antonelli P2 (+0.293s). Mercedes disindaki en yakin pilot P3'teki Hadjar (+0.785s). Russell'in S1 (27.498s), S2 (17.284s) ve S3 (33.736s) en hizli sektorleri herkesin en iyisiydi.

annotations.text_en: Verstappen, Stroll, and Sainz all had no qualifying time and started from the back. Verstappen's absence from qualifying meant he started P16 on hard tires with a reverse strategy. Despite this, he finished P6, showcasing his raw pace advantage over the midfield.
annotations.text_tr: Verstappen, Stroll ve Sainz'in hicbirinin siralama zamani yoktu ve arkadan basladilar. Verstappen'in siralamada bulunamamasi sert lastiklerle P16'dan ters stratejiyle baslamasi anlamina geldi. Buna ragmen P6 bitirerek orta grup uzerindeki ham pace avantajini sergiledi.

annotations.text_en: Cadillac was the slowest team in qualifying: Perez P18 (+4.087s), Bottas P19 (+4.726s), both eliminated in Q1. Nearly 5 seconds off pole on a 1:18 lap is an enormous deficit. The Cadillac's energy management issues compound in qualifying where every joule matters.
annotations.text_tr: Cadillac siralamadaki en yavas takimdi: Perez P18 (+4.087s), Bottas P19 (+4.726s), ikisi de Q1'de elendi. 1:18'lik bir turda pole'dan 5 saniye geride olmak muazzam bir acik. Cadillac'in enerji yonetimi sorunlari her joule'un onemli oldugu siralamada birlesiyor.

annotations.text_en: Compare Russell and Leclerc on Lap 15 (just after VSC1): Russell on fresh hards clocked 1:22.825 while Leclerc on 15-lap-old mediums managed 1:23.765. The speed trace reveals the gap comes mainly from corner exit speeds where Russell's fresh tires provide better traction.
annotations.text_tr: 15. turda Russell ve Leclerc'i karsilastirin (VSC1 sonrasi): taze sert lastikli Russell 1:22.825 yaparken, 15 turlu medium lastikli Leclerc 1:23.765 yapabildi. Hiz grafigi farkin ozellikle viraj cikis hizlarindan geldigini gosteriyor, Russell'in taze lastikleri daha iyi cekis sagliyor.

annotations.text_en: Verstappen's Lap 43 (1:22.091) was the fastest single lap by any driver all race. On fresh hard tires, the Red Bull's straight-line speed was unmatched. The speed trace shows Verstappen gaining 3-4 km/h on Russell through the main straight, but the Mercedes was faster through the medium-speed corners.
annotations.text_tr: Verstappen'in 43. turu (1:22.091) tum yarista herhangi bir pilotun attigi en hizli turdu. Taze sert lastiklerle Red Bull'un duzluk hizi rakipsizdi. Hiz grafigi Verstappen'in ana duzlukte Russell'dan 3-4 km/h kazandigini ama Mercedes'in orta hizli virajlarda daha hizli oldugunu gosteriyor.

annotations.text_en: Antonelli's Lap 57 (1:22.417) was faster than Russell's best (1:22.670). The speed trace comparison between teammates reveals Antonelli carries more speed through Turn 11-12 complex and brakes later into Turn 9. The rookie is finding time in the most demanding sections.
annotations.text_tr: Antonelli'nin 57. turu (1:22.417) Russell'in en iyisinden (1:22.670) daha hizliydi. Takim arkadaslari arasindaki hiz grafigi karsilastirmasi Antonelli'nin Viraj 11-12 kompleksinde daha fazla hiz tasiyip Viraj 9'a daha gec fren yaptigini ortaya koyuyor. Rookie en zorlayici bolumlerde zaman buluyor.

annotations.text_en: Albert Park's energy map reveals two distinct zones: heavy harvesting in the Turn 9-10 braking zone and Turn 11-12 chicane, aggressive deploy through the Turn 1-2 exit and the run to Turn 3. Ferrari's clipping is most visible on the lakeside straight where the speed trace plateaus while Mercedes continues accelerating.
annotations.text_tr: Albert Park'in enerji haritasi iki belirgin bolge gosteriyor: Viraj 9-10 fren bolgesinde ve Viraj 11-12 sikanda yogun harvesting, Viraj 1-2 cikisi ve Viraj 3'e gidiste agresif deploy. Ferrari'nin clipping'i en cok gol kenari duzlugunde gorunuyor: hiz grafigi plato yaparken Mercedes hizlanmaya devam ediyor.

annotations.text_en: Switch to energy mode on the track map and compare Russell vs Hamilton on any racing lap. Russell's deploy zones (green) extend further out of corners, while Hamilton's clipping zones (amber) dominate the straights. The Ferrari hits its battery limit 50-80m earlier than the Mercedes on every straight.
annotations.text_tr: Pist haritasinda enerji moduna gecin ve herhangi bir yaris turunda Russell ile Hamilton'i karsilastirin. Russell'in deploy bolgeleri (yesil) viraj cikislarinda daha uzaga uzanirken, Hamilton'in clipping bolgeleri (amber) duzluklere hakim. Ferrari her duzlukte Mercedes'ten 50-80 metre once batarya limitine ulasiyor.
